June 15, 2026
jggg388 06/15/2026 10:41 AM
🏆 Introducing the DOTW Achievement Roles! 🎨 Starting today, designers will be able to earn achievement titles based on their Design of the Week (DOTW) victories. 🌟 @Unknown User Awarded for 2 DOTW wins 🏆 @Unknown User Awarded for 5 DOTW wins 👑 @Unknown User Awarded for 10 DOTW wins If you have already met the requirements for any of these roles before this announcement, your role will be given shortly. To keep things fair and easy to track, only DOTW wins from 2026 onward will count toward these achievement roles. Keep creating, keep improving, and keep sharing your best work. (edited)
